creator: flo@smeets.im
text:
As my tests of app_meetme are successful and the original submitter of 
this PR cannot test it anymore it think this PR should be closed.

-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Re: ports/129682: net/asterisk app_meetme issue
Date: Sat, 2 Oct 2010 18:46:38 +0300
From: eng. Anatoli Marinov <tolisoft@gmail.com>
To: Florian Smeets <flo@smeets.im>

I had the issue several months (or years) ago and we do not use
app_meetme now. The server is in production usage and I cannot do any
tests.

So :) close the issue :)
